title: Monetary Policy Report Index
summary: This source is a Federal Reserve index page listing historical Monetary Policy Report testimonies from 1996 through 2025 (June). The page provides only navigation links without any substantive policy content, actual reports, or data. No specific monetary policy decisions, statements, or analysis can be extracted from this navigation page.
key_points: This is a navigation/index page for Federal Reserve Monetary Policy Reports, not an actual report
Links to reports from 1996-2025 are listed chronologically
Each entry links to Testimony HTML, PDF, and Chart Data pages
No monetary policy content, decisions, or analysis present in this source
Source is thin and not suitable for RAG archive without accessing individual report links
why_it_matters: This index page has no standalone research value. It merely provides links to underlying reports which would need to be retrieved individually. For a finance research archive, the actual testimonies and reports—not this directory—should be archived.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/index page, not an actual report or article (violates Rule 5)
URL is blank - missing source attribution (violates Rule 6)

event_type is 'unknown' but correct classification is clear: this is a navigation page, not a monetary_policy_report

notes: Source is a Federal Reserve index page for Monetary Policy Reports. No substantive content to extract. This is a navigation page that lists historical links to testimonies from 1996-2025. Last update noted as June 20, 2025. For research purposes, individual report links (HTML/PDF) would need to be accessed directly to obtain actual policy content.
